author: Test User <dragos.cirjan@gmail.com>
title: Version Bump for Mono Repo
description: Version Bump for Mono Repo -> Please inspect the current code ( #file:action.yml and the src folder) and draft a nice LLD for a github action that is bumping versions on a multi language monorepo. The LLD should be more under the form of a HLD with lots of technical suggestions. I want to translate the current project from JavaScript to TypeScript; maybe use `@actions/core` module to create the version commits and not git commands; I am trying to move towards a more logical and more api based approach. Draft a document and let's see where it takes us.
